comments: A revised version of this show was broadcast 26 December 1980

track_listing.track: Genesis live at Lyceum, London 7th May 1980

transcript.text: You're listening to The Friday Rock Show and the program I hope you're enjoying is Genesis in Concert.
Listening to Genesis in Concert from BBC Radio 1.
This is The Friday Rock Show.
The Friday Rock Show. You're listening to Genesis in Concert.
Genesis in Concert as recorded during their recent sellout performances here in London.
And if you'd like a list of the tracks as broadcast just send me a stamped address envelope and I'll be more than happy to oblige.
Now next week, the Friday Rock Show is going to be introduced by one of rock's finest showmen, Ian Gillum.
